code_completion.readiness_note: Code-level completion is not honjia cutover completion. The Wave 3 P0/P1 software closure is represented and tested, but honjia cutover remains blocked until hardware validation and legacy shim removal gates are recorded.

cutover_readiness.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.

legacy_shim_policy.policy: Legacy copies are allowed only as explicitly named transitional shims. Their presence blocks any claim that eihead is fully detached from legacy body runtime.

shims.reason: Temporary honjia body runtime compatibility during eihead split.
shims.removal_gate: HeadRuntimeApp snapshot/actions no longer instantiate or import BodyRuntimeApp.

shims.reason: Temporary honjia hardware/runtime implementation before native eihead modules replace it.
shims.removal_gate: Native eihead eye, neck, ear, and mouth providers pass honjia parity without eibrain.body imports.

shims.reason: temporary realtime scheduler compatibility until eibrain/eihead protocol split is complete
shims.removal_gate: Voice round lifecycle and scheduler state are owned by eihead/eiprotocol contracts without eibrain scheduler imports.

shims.reason: Shared config helpers kept until eihead owns its deployment config layer.
shims.removal_gate: eihead owns its deployment config layer and no longer needs shared eibrain infra helpers.

shims.reason: Shared voice-chain readiness helpers kept until eihead owns native voice diagnostics end-to-end.
shims.removal_gate: Voice-chain readiness normalization is owned by eihead/eiprotocol without eibrain compatibility helpers.

shims.reason: Shared protocol MVP carried as an export copy; EXPORT_MANIFEST pins the independent /dev-project/eiprotocol revision when supplied.
shims.removal_gate: eiprotocol is consumed as an independent package rather than a copied export payload.

shims.reason: Temporary protocol compatibility until eiprotocol is split into its own repo.
shims.removal_gate: eihead and eibrain both consume eiprotocol directly without legacy eibrain.protocol compatibility exports.

shims.reason: Head-side hardware verification helpers retained while verify_hardware CLI is transitional.
shims.removal_gate: Hardware verification CLI/checks are native to eihead or a shared verification package.

monitor_endpoints.truthfulness_rule: Return real health or explicit degraded/error state; never fake healthy.
Delegated compatibility must remain visible until native providers own status.
Report device readiness from real probes or explicit unknown/offline/degraded states.
Realtime boxes/scores/parser readiness must come from live /dev/video0 and /dev/hailo0 data or explicit not_wired/degraded states.
Alias for realtime eye diagnostics; static-image compatibility cannot satisfy this endpoint.
Voice diagnostics may show offline/quasi-streaming data, but missing streaming stages must remain not_wired/unknown/degraded.
Alias for voice diagnostics; hardware-unverified closed-loop diagnostics are not real streaming completion.
Report recent actions only when runtime exposes a real action log, otherwise not_wired.
Report recent events only when runtime exposes a real event journal, otherwise not_wired.

native_provider_modules.readiness_note: Native boundary exists, but honjia realtime camera/Hailo validation is still required.
Pure pan planning is native; honjia Raspbot/I2C actuation still depends on legacy body shims.
Native voice status contracts exist; real streaming microphone/VAD/ASR validation is not complete.
Native playback contracts exist; audible TTS/playback/stop validation is still required.
Runtime API and monitor are native wrappers while snapshot/action paths still delegate to legacy body runtime.

future_capabilities.compatibility_note: Static image detection is retained only as a compatibility and test placeholder.
future_capabilities.name: eye.realtime_stream_detection
future_capabilities.target: Realtime camera/Hailo stream detection feeding live RealtimeVisionObservation and monitor status data.

migration_notes.note: The production eye direction for /dev-project/eihead is realtime stream detection; static image detection is not a deployment target.

native_completion_gates.blockers: /dev/video0 and /dev/hailo0 realtime stream validation on honjia.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: static image detection remains compatibility-only and must not satisfy native realtime eye completion.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: Realtime boxes, scores, frame age, parser readiness, and stale/error state are visible on port 18080.

native_completion_gates.blockers: /dev/i2c-1 Raspbot adapter validation and pan-only settle/no-oscillation test on honjia.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: Do not advertise tilt support unless real tilt hardware is installed and accepted.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: move_head pan/yaw reaches the native adapter, tilt returns unsupported, and monitor shows target angle plus suppression reason.

native_completion_gates.blockers: U4K microphone, VAD, ASR model, and mouth-busy suppression validation on honjia.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: Closed-loop diagnostics are not hardware-verified realtime streaming until live audio proves them.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: Voice wake emits a traceable ASR turn with stage latency and no fake healthy state for missing streaming stages.

native_completion_gates.blockers: MiniMax TTS synthesis, local playback device, stop_speech, and busy-state validation on honjia.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: Synthesis configuration without audible playback is not completion.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: speak is audible, stop_speech interrupts or reports a real unsupported reason, and monitor shows real provider/playback state.

native_completion_gates.blockers: honjia hardware cutover remains blocked until real voice/audio/monitor validation proves the scheduler-backed loop on device.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: Scheduler code-level completion is not honjia realtime audio/LLM/TTS hardware completion.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: scheduler snapshot lanes, speech/action plan, proactive activity, cancellation, and eiprotocol bridge events remain visible in monitor/export without claiming honjia hardware completion.

native_completion_gates.blockers: HeadRuntimeApp still depends on delegated legacy body runtime for part of the snapshot/action path.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: Delegated compatibility must remain visible in status until native providers own the path.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: snapshot/actions use native eye, neck, ear, and mouth providers without requiring apps.body_runtime.

native_completion_gates.blockers: Legacy package copies are still required until native runtime parity removes imports.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: The export manifest must name every transitional package until its removal gate passes.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: Generated /dev-project/eihead installs and starts without apps.body_runtime or eibrain.body except named shims.

native_completion_gates.blockers: honjia Phase 0 baseline, service cutover, reboot persistence, and rollback checks.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard: Report not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked until the acceptance gate is verified.
native_completion_gates.fake_completion_guard_note: Do not enable permanent eihead services until real-device parity is recorded.
native_completion_gates.next_acceptance: honjia Phase 0 baseline repeats with equal or better voice, vision, neck, monitor, and rollback results.

native_realtime_eye_files.role: Realtime GStreamer/Hailo adapter scaffold for /dev/video0 camera frames and /dev/hailo0 detections.
Native realtime /dev/video0 GStreamer appsink reader and Hailo pipeline launcher.
Native /dev/hailo0 Hailo ROI metadata parser for realtime detection boxes and scores.
Realtime eye pipeline contracts shared by native adapters and monitor status.
Monitor payload normalizer for live realtime eye data and not-wired truthfulness.

native_realtime_voice_files.role: Native eihead ear realtime package boundary and exports.
Native realtime voice ingestion pipeline contracts and status shapes.
Native eihead mouth package boundary and exports.
Native speech synthesis/playback service with stop and busy-state reporting.
Monitor payload normalizer for offline/quasi-streaming closed-loop voice diagnostics and not-wired truthfulness.

native_runtime_web_files.role: Runtime HTTP API surface for native head status/action requests.
Web monitor composition including /api/voice/realtime and /api/audio/realtime voice panels.
Runtime service facade that binds realtime vision/voice/mouth status into monitor payloads.

requires: Repeat the Phase 0 honjia baseline after export using real voice, vision, neck, monitor, and rollback evidence.
Validate continuous /dev/video0 frames and /dev/hailo0 detections on honjia.
Record boxes, scores, frame age, parser readiness, stale state, and error state on port 18080.
Validate /dev/i2c-1 Raspbot pan/yaw movement, settle behavior, and unsupported tilt truthfulness on honjia.
Validate U4K microphone capture, VAD/ASR turn telemetry, mouth-busy suppression, audible TTS playback, and stop_speech on honjia.
Start eihead runtime and monitor services on honjia, verify reboot persistence, and prove rollback restores the previous eibrain services.

blocked_by_legacy_detachment.removal_gate: HeadRuntimeApp snapshot/actions no longer instantiate or import BodyRuntimeApp.
Native eihead eye, neck, ear, and mouth providers pass honjia parity without eibrain.body imports.
Voice round lifecycle and scheduler state are owned by eihead/eiprotocol contracts without eibrain scheduler imports.
eihead owns its deployment config layer and no longer needs shared eibrain infra helpers.
Voice-chain readiness normalization is owned by eihead/eiprotocol without eibrain compatibility helpers.
eiprotocol is consumed as an independent package rather than a copied export payload.
eihead and eibrain both consume eiprotocol directly without legacy eibrain.protocol compatibility exports.
Hardware verification CLI/checks are native to eihead or a shared verification package.

evidence: EXPORT_MANIFEST.json records code_completion, software_closure, cutover_readiness, and legacy_shim_policy.
Focused export tests assert code-level completion is not honjia cutover completion.
native_runtime_web_files names the exported runtime and monitor API surface.
monitor_endpoints require real data or explicit not_wired, unknown, degraded, or blocked states.
native_realtime_eye_files exports the GStreamer, Hailo metadata, realtime contracts, and monitor adapter boundaries.
Static image detection remains compatibility/test-only and cannot satisfy realtime eye completion.
native_realtime_voice_files exports ear, mouth, and voice monitor diagnostic boundaries.
Closed-loop diagnostics remain offline/quasi-streaming until honjia audio hardware proves the real loop.
legacy_shim_policy names every copied legacy package as a transitional shim.
full_detachment_claim_allowed stays false while legacy runtime copies remain required.

software_closure.truthfulness_rule: Code-level completion means the software gates are represented and tested; honjia cutover remains blocked until real hardware validation records parity.

transitional_packages.reason: Temporary honjia body runtime compatibility during eihead split.
Temporary honjia hardware/runtime implementation before native eihead modules replace it.
temporary realtime scheduler compatibility until eibrain/eihead protocol split is complete
Shared config helpers kept until eihead owns its deployment config layer.
Shared voice-chain readiness helpers kept until eihead owns native voice diagnostics end-to-end.
Shared protocol MVP carried as an export copy; EXPORT_MANIFEST pins the independent /dev-project/eiprotocol revision when supplied.
Temporary protocol compatibility until eiprotocol is split into its own repo.
Head-side hardware verification helpers retained while verify_hardware CLI is transitional.
